# Bhuwanta Developers

> Bhuwanta Developers is a Hyderabad-based real estate company delivering HMDA and DTCP approved open plots, villa plots, and farmlands across Hyderabad's growth corridors, including Warangal Highway, Mumbai Highway, and Shabad.

Bhuwanta Developers specializes in legally clear, government-approved (HMDA/DTCP/RERA) residential open plots for first-time buyers, growing families, and NRI investors, with a focus on transparent pricing and Vastu-compliant layouts. The company has 20+ years of leadership experience in Hyderabad's real estate market.

## Company
- [About Bhuwanta Developers](https://bhuwanta.com/about): Company background, leadership, and mission
- [Projects](https://bhuwanta.com/projects): Current plot developments across Hyderabad

## Projects
- S.V. Kanaka Maple Homes — Warangal Highway, near Yadagirigutta Temple corridor — DTCP & RERA approved
- TJR Township — Sangareddy Junction, Mumbai Highway — HMDA & RERA approved
- Vaibhav County — Sadashivpet, Mumbai Highway — DTCP & RERA approved
- Vian Vally — Shabad — HMDA & RERA approved

## Guides
- [Hyderabad Real Estate Investment 2026](https://bhuwanta.com/blog/hyderabad-real-estate-investment-2026-best-areas-open-plots): Best areas, open plot vs apartment comparison, and 2026 investment trends
- [HMDA vs DTCP Approved Plots](https://bhuwanta.com/hmda-vs-dtcp-plots-hyderabad): Complete comparison of approval types, pricing, and appreciation potential

## Contact
Headquarters: Alluri Trade Center, Floor #5, Unit #406, KPHB, Near KPHB Metro Station, Hyderabad, Telangana 500072
